shipping_provider.title: Shipping Provider Template
shipping_provider.description: API configuration and selectors for a shipping company, defined solely by the Admin template

type.description: Determines if this is a parent tracking system (like Hawk) or a source logs system (like Jood/Shaya)

loginCheck.description: Response content check parameter confirming successful login

rowSelector.description: CSS HTML selector used by Cheerio to target lists of orders

idWaslSelector.description: Selector/index specification used to extract tracking number

sequenceSelector.description: Selector/index specification used to extract sequencing text

columns.description: Expected structured headers column indices for matched tabular scraping

user_config.title: User Configurations
user_config.description: User profile with default credentials and linked providers

sourceProviderIds.description: Array of strings referencing enabled source company templates

parentCredentials.description: Credentials for logging into default parent provider (username/password)

sourceCredentials.description: Mapped credentials for logging into the active sources

activity_log.title: Activity Logs
activity_log.description: Historical audit logs tracking updating user actions and scraping status

userId.description: UID of the user performing the action

username.description: Platform username of the user performing the action

details.description: Dynamic contextual parameters or results of the action

timestamp.description: ISO timestamp of when the action occurred

/shipping_providers/{providerId}.description: Global templates for corporate providers managed solely by Admin

/users/{userId}.description: User account configurations and provider assignments

/activity_logs/{logId}.description: Audit trails and live transaction logs of platform users
